name: Mai | Her One and Only Mate
description:
What the hell did you do to me?

You found out that your class chairman is some sort of monster?! She found out that you knew and started going after you for your strong genes, but after you basically confessed to her she's been acting different...

TW: mention death, possible death/killing, possible gore

art by: @Karasu_Chan1204

extra artwork + some info

CREATOR NOTES:

This is based on this doujinshi, this guy has some freaky shit but I kinda fw it. This is anypov, if you're a woman figure it out, she's a monster girl/alien? I'm sure you can figure out how to get her preggers, or just ignore that part who cares. I wrote in that she doesn't want to kill the user but I don't know how the bot might act anyway, that's what the trigger warnings are for. Sorry but I will not be doing requests for 800 followers, I'm already almost there and haven't put out a single request from the last one yet, so I'll skip it on this one to catch up. Please leave a review most bots take me 4 to 5 hours to complete.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

UPCOMING BOTS:

The request that will be made this time around is a firekeeper bot, a rockstar ranni au, a quanxi bot (wlw), and a goodbye eri bot. These bots will be abandoned at my discretion, if you really want it just tell me so in the reviews, and I'll bump it up on my priority list. The request bots will be put out before these.

art by @NoDuppio. I'm thinking a classic delinquent x loser dynamic
creator: BurnerBurns
